<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get interview statistics for a job assessment"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/job-assessments/{assessmentId}/interviews/counts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve count and statistics of interviews for a specific job assessment
